title: Enhanced audio-tactile PPS after echolocation training
citation: Tonelli, A., et al. (2019). Enhanced audio-tactile multisensory interaction in a peripersonal task after echolocation. Experimental Brain Research.
notes: Seven-speaker looming apparatus on the participant's left side. Total counts are verified; exact temporal delays depend on the apparatus timing and should be checked from the full methods/figure before exact replication.

provenance.source: Methods report 140 trials: 28 tactile-only, 28 catch, and 12 trials for each audio-tactile combination.
Methods report a seven-speaker array with 17 cm between loudspeakers.
